## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor

## Validation

- [ ] I ran bun format
- [ ] I ran bun check
- [ ] I tested the changed behavior locally

## Notes for reviewers

Include anything reviewers should focus on (tradeoffs, edge cases, risks).
